notes: IFC-269: Fixed 5 security bugs (B-02, B-03, B-04, B-05, B-07) in Account module. B-01 was already fixed. Added tenantId to all AccountRepository read/delete methods for defense-in-depth tenant isolation. Added ACCOUNT_SORT_FIELDS allowlist. Added audit logging to all 5 mutations with logPermissionDenied on cross-tenant denials (AC-007). Implemented $transaction wrapping on assignOwner (B-05). Fixed save() tenant-blind upsert (split to updateMany+create). Fixed getById enrichment and assignOwner persist to use tenant-scoped WHERE. Added existsByName Prisma tests and sortBy rejection tests. Propagated interface changes to AccountService, OpportunityService, ContactService, LeadService, and lead conversion use cases.

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/modules/account && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/adapters exec vitest run __tests__/PrismaAccountRepository src/repositories/__tests__/PrismaAccountRepository && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators exec vitest run __tests__/account

validation_results.name: Build
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/domain build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/adapters build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators build
